description: Custom modules for ZIKYinc applications and tools.

modules.name: I-DB Handler
modules.description: A comprehensive data and IndexedDB handler for initializing application state from a configuration file.

prompts.title: Setup New Project Data
prompts.description: Initialize a new project with a basic data structure.
prompts.content: Create a new `appdata.json` file with a basic structure for a task management app. Include a 'Tasks' database with 'id', 'title', and 'status' fields.

prompts.title: Add New Database Store
prompts.description: Add a new store to an existing database configuration.
prompts.content: Add a 'Users' store to the 'AppDB' database in `appdata.json`. The store should use 'id' as the keyPath and include an index for 'email'.

functions.name: new DataManager()
functions.description: Creates a new instance of the DataManager.

functions.name: manager.init(configUrl, cleanStale?)
functions.description: Initializes the entire data system by fetching the config, setting up databases, and loading default data. Optionally cleans stale databases/stores.

functions.name: manager.getMigrationFailures()
functions.description: Returns an array of items that failed to migrate during the last initialization.

functions.name: manager.getSettings()
functions.description: Returns the loaded application settings object.

functions.name: manager.getData()
functions.description: Returns the loaded application data object.
